title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Air India Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Air India Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!
